creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
I have add a workaround to let it build.
	 In the first place the maintainer should
	 have cc me or at least the pr followup to
	 keep us committer in the loop.

I think I'm confusing 2 things. The maintainer
is working on updating the port at the same time.
The patches I have are for the newer version, 3.98.1.
I'll give your workaround a go later.

sorry for any misunderstanding.

Anyway, the 3.98.1 now builds on amd64, starts, but dumps core
on trying to open a file:

 ERROR: In /usr/ports/science/paraview/work/ParaView-3.98.1-source/ParaViewCore/ServerImplementation/Core/vtkSIProxy.cxx, line 307
vtkSISourceProxy (0x8272ef1c0): Failed to create vtkMPIImageReader. Aborting for debugging purposes.

[1]    Abort                         paraview (core dumped)

Thanks

Anton
